message:
feat(abi): add mlock2, name_to_handle_at, and open_by_handle_at syscall wrappers

Expand the ABI surface with three new syscall wrappers:

- mlock2 (mmap_abi): Flags-aware memory locking that extends the
  basic mlock interface with MLOCK_ONFAULT support, allowing pages
  to be locked only when they are first faulted in rather than
  requiring immediate population.

- name_to_handle_at (unistd_abi): Converts a pathname to a persistent
  file handle, integrating with the membrane policy layer to enforce
  access control on handle generation.

- open_by_handle_at (unistd_abi): Opens a file using a previously
  obtained handle, with corresponding policy integration to validate
  handle-based access against the membrane rules.

Both handle operations go through the standard membrane Permit/Deny
flow with errno=EACCES on denial.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
